feed.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D2) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM FD-FRC-E-D2.

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D2) — firmware 2.55.1
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D2 — firmware 2.55.1

Part: FORCE REIGNITION FD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D2) — firmware 2.54.0
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D2 — firmware 2.54.0

Part: FORCE REIGNITION FD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version  before installing this Device Firmware Update.   This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D2) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D2 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: FORCE REIGNITION FD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D2) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D2 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: FORCE REIGNITION FD

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D2 — firmware 2.48.0

entry.title: FORCE FD (FD-FRC-E-D2) — firmware 2.41.0
entry.summary:
FORCE FD FD-FRC-E-D2 — firmware 2.41.0

Part: FORCE REIGNITION FD

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting.

Released: 2023-01-11
